title: Extract RunPod section of MpiSettings.js into MpiRunpodSettings compound
description: REFACTOR (from 2026-07-02 complexity audit; ~4h, low-medium risk, largest win). MpiSettings.js is 2,303 lines / churn 44 — the biggest component in the app. Lines ~400-2200 (~1,800 lines) are entirely the RunPod section: GPU/DC/volume pickers, connect/disconnect, status poll, disk usage bar, retry-wait reflection, network-volume lifecycle — with its own local state (_runpodAvailability, _runpodVolumes, _engineBusy, _connectAbort, 5 interval timers, 8 locals) and all RunPod Events wiring. Nothing in common with the App Behavior + External Folders head (~400 lines). EXTRACT: new Compound js/components/Compounds/LandingPages/MpiRunpodSettings/ via ComponentFactory; MpiSettings becomes a thin container mounting it; shared binding stays state.runpodConfig. Standard rules apply: BEM, preloadStyles.js registration, types.js props, el.destroy() cleaning all timers/unsubs. Verify: settings panel opens, connect/disconnect cycle, volume create/delete, timers cleaned on navigate away. BRANCH: RunPod. Do AFTER MPI-173 (shares _isStockRefusal extraction).
